original_abstract: This research aims to explore and analyze the challenges and dynamics faced by entrepreneurship and innovation in the face of profound changes in the digital era. Research methods to investigate the Future of Entrepreneurship and Innovation in the Digital Age can be directed through a combination of qualitative and quantitative approaches. This holistic approach enables a thorough understanding of the unique challenges and dynamics emerging in the context of technological change. This research is expected to provide in-depth insights into the dynamics of entrepreneurship and innovation in the digital age, helping entrepreneurs and stakeholders to understand changes and adjust their strategies.
humanized_abstract: This research is concerned with identifying and examining the challenges and complexities faced by entrepreneurship and innovation in a transformative digital age. Possible research methods for exploring the Future of Entrepreneurship and Innovation in the Digital Age can be both qualitative and quantitative. This research aims at shedding more light on the complexities of entrepreneurship and innovation in the digital age and enhancing the preparedness of entrepreneurs as well as stakeholders to the ongoing digital transformation and the emerging changes and demands in this new context.
